mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_exam_answer (exam_record_id, question_id, student_answer, is_correct, score) VALUES (#{examRecordId}, #{questionId}, #{studentAnswer}, #{isCorrect}, #{score})

INSERT INTO t_exam_answer (exam_record_id, question_id, student_answer, is_correct, score) VALUES
(#{item.examRecordId}, #{item.questionId}, #{item.studentAnswer}, #{item.isCorrect}, #{item.score})
mapper.select: SELECT ea.*, q.content AS question_content, q.answer AS correct_answer, q.analysis, q.question_type FROM t_exam_answer ea LEFT JOIN t_question q ON ea.question_id = q.question_id WHERE ea.exam_record_id = #{examRecordId} ORDER BY ea.answer_id
